name: Graphite
desc: A private, modular node based AI workspace for thinking and creation. Seamlessly connect to Ollama, OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, and Groq models in one unified, …
descFull: A private, modular node based AI workspace for thinking and creation. Seamlessly connect to Ollama, OpenAI, Gemini, Anthropic, and Groq models in one unified, node-based interface for reasoning, visualization, and exploration — all running locally or via API.
